asset.title: Chat
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: A concise walkthrough demonstrating the real-time chat functionality within a NodeRoom workspace. The video shows a user typing and sending a message, which appears instantly in the public chat panel.

featureClarity.evidence: The chat input and message delivery are clearly visible in the central panel.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete flow of clicking the input, typing a message, and sending it.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode UI is clean and well-spaced, though the bottom caption overlay is slightly large.

consistency.evidence: Fits the NodeRoom theme of collaborative rooms with files and agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen recording of the web application interface.

legibility.evidence: The typed text and UI elements are readable at standard browser sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates essential team communication features for collaborative reviews.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts standard chat input and rendering behavior.

observedEvidence: User list with Maya and NodeAgent
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Real-time chat within a NodeRoom workspace to coordinate team reviews.
